title: Business Development Executive (Central)
description:
📍 Location: Central
🕒 Work Hours: Mon–Fri 9am–6pm, Sat (9am-1pm) Virtual Meeting
💰 Salary: Up to $3,500 (Basic) + Commission + AWS

Our client is one of the leading providers of apparel manufacturing and rental solutions for parties and corporate entertainment events across Southeast Asia.

Responsibilities:

  • Generate and convert new business leads through outreach, networking, and market research.
  • Build and maintain strong relationships with clients while understanding their needs and providing suitable proposals.
  • Prepare and present quotations, proposals, contracts, and business pitches to support sales efforts.
  • Track market trends and competitors to identify new opportunities and support business growth strategies.
  • Meet sales targets, maintain reports on leads and performance, and coordinate with internal teams for smooth execution.

Requirements:

  • Proven experience in business development, sales, or account management, preferably in a B2B environment.
  • Strong communication, negotiation, and interpersonal skills with the ability to build long-term client relationships.
  • Ability to conduct market research, identify opportunities, and develop action plans to achieve sales targets.
  • Self-motivated, results-driven, and able to work independently as well as collaboratively with internal teams.


To apply, kindly click APPLY NOW to submit your latest CV.

We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.



SAAY

EA License No.: 25C2695

postedCompany.description:
At Search Avenue Pte Ltd, we believe recruitment is more than just filling positions — it’s about building futures. Founded by two passionate individuals with over 12 years of recruitment experience, Search Avenue was born out of a shared vision: to raise the standards of recruitment through integrity, innovation, and unwavering dedication to people.

We are deeply committed to understanding the evolving needs of both employers and candidates. Our approach combines advanced technology with a human touch, ensuring personalized, efficient, and meaningful hiring experiences. Whether it’s permanent placements, executive searches, or talent mapping, our mission remains the same — to connect top-tier talent with companies that value diversity, capability, and culture fit.

Driven by our founders’ belief in work-life harmony, we champion flexible career opportunities and inclusive workplaces. Our goal is to empower individuals to thrive in their careers while honoring their personal commitments — and to help businesses grow stronger through passionate, high-performing teams.

At Search Avenue, recruitment is our craft — and people are our purpose.
postedCompany.name: SEARCH AVENUE PRIVATE LIMITED
